component_families.acceptance_blocker: actuator envelopes are inventoried, but final generated bodies still need positive clearance proof
component_families.label: Motors and actuators
component_families.required_geometry: motor body envelope, output axis, ctrl range, and non-scaled mounting clearance

component_families.acceptance_blocker: joint axes and ranges are inventoried, but mate-interface and swept-clearance proof is still required

component_families.acceptance_blocker: collision geoms exist, but final generated bodies still need component-specific clearance certification

component_families.acceptance_blocker: source envelopes are measured, but they are not a substitute for named internal component clearances
